title: aspidosperma eburneum
intro: Aspidosperma eburneum, also known as the ivory tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains the alkaloid quebrachine, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Aspidosperma eburneum has been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and relax muscles. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
